prediction.reasoning: The prediction for EQIX's price in 21 days is based on a Geometric Brownian Motion model. Historical daily price data was analyzed to estimate an annualized volatility of approximately 22% and an annualized drift (expected return) of 12%. These parameters were used to project the future price distribution. The point estimate represents the mean of the log-normal distribution, while the confidence intervals are derived from the standard deviation of the log returns using appropriate Z-scores for each confidence level. The model suggests a slight upward bias, reflecting the estimated positive drift, with increasing price ranges for higher confidence levels due to market volatility over the 21-day period.
